heading: Use of certain local currency
label: 1736g–3 Use of certain local currency
text: Local currency payments received by the United States pursuant to agreements entered into under subchapter II (as in effect on ) may be utilized by the Secretary in accordance with (as in effect on ).November 27, 1990November 27, 1990section 1708 of this title
